episodes.title: I Went Undercover Inside Scientology
episodes.description:
I snuck into Scientology to expose them! Thank you guys so much for all the support. Here is the Patreon if you're interested in supporting me further and seeing all the BTS from these crazy videos.
https://www.patreon.com/cw/ManuelBoza?utm_source=search&vanity=ManuelBoza 
You absolutely don't have to if you don't want to appreciate you regardless!
-
I also used some clips from other videos as b-roll while i was inside my camera kept having issues.  I think they were turning it off tbh but i dont know for sure
-
Thank you to my friends for joining me!
Gay - @calgo 
Not Mexican - @EdwinCamachoo 
Glutten free - https://www.instagram.com/theannashah/
-
